title: Somerset ® Enhanced Satin White
description: Description Somerset ® Enhanced Satin White is produced by St Cuthberts Mill, based in England. The mill uses a traditional cylinder mould to manufacture a paper that looks and feels as though it is handmade. St Cuthberts Mill have been making paper since the 1700's, and today manufacturers the Somerset ® Enhanced digital fine art range. The smooth satin matt surface has a timeless quality which accentuates all the detail in the final print without any distractions. The 100% cotton paper contains no optical brighteners, and the natural white base adds colour, depth, and vitality to the final print. The proprietary inkjet coating guarantees superb image quality and longevity, which is essential for both limited and open edition digital fine art prints. The Somerset ® Enhanced range is available in a range of weights, including 330gsm and 225gsm and sizes. The Somerset ® Enhanced rolls are available as 12 metre rolls from 17” up to 60” wide and sheets are available in A4 through to A2. Somerset ® is a traditional printmaking paper which has been used by artists for a range of time-honoured techniques such as intaglio, etching, stone lithography, silkscreen, relief printing and letterpress. The same traditional fine art paper is now available for photographers, printmakers, and artists alike to reproduce digitally their original artwork as a limited edition by using the Somerset ® Enhanced digital fine art papers. Products, ICC profiles, usage tips at www.canson-infinity.com

Products, ICC profiles, usage tips at www.canson-infinity.com

title: Somerset ® Enhanced Watercolour White
description: Description Produced by the artisan papermakers at St Cuthberts Mill in England, Somerset ® Enhanced Watercolour White has a traditional watercolour ‘cold pressed’ surface finish. The 100% cotton mould made paper, has a natural white base, produced without the use of optical brighteners. The paper has a soft, refined feel to the touch and the textured surface offers printmakers, artists, and photographers a painterly feel to the final print. The proprietary inkjet coating guarantees superb image quality and longevity, which is essential for both limited and open edition digital fine art prints. The Somerset ® Enhanced Watercolour White 240gsm is available in sheets from A4 to A2 and 12 metre length rolls. Somerset ® is a traditional printmaking paper which has been used by artists for a range of time-honoured techniques such as intaglio, etching, stone lithography, silkscreen, relief printing and letterpress. The same traditional fine art paper is now available for photographers, printmakers, and artists alike to reproduce digitally their original artwork as a limited edition by using the Somerset ® Enhanced digital fine art papers Products, ICC profiles, usage tips at www.canson-infinity.com

title: Aquarelle Canson
description: Description Traditionnally produced on a cylinder-mould machine, Aquarelle Canson® paper is made from 60% cotton fibres. It has excellent longevity due to the fact it is alkaline-buffered. Its natural white colour allows the artist to play with contrasts and perspectives and it brings light and homogeneity to watercolours. It is very simple to correct whether the paper is wet or dry.

title: XL ® Watercolour
description: Description XL ® Watercolour was specially designed for wet techniques including watercolour. It is perfect for students, as the paper is very easy to correct and it can be washed with a sponge or a brush. XL ® Watercolour is also available as a book. With its large spiral binding and hard cover, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling.

title: Graduate Watercolour
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Watercolour pads feature white, durable, fine grain paper. They contain 20 sheets of 250gsm paper. Perfect for getting started with watercolours and achieving the best results! Canson ® Graduate Watercolour is also available as a book.

title: Figueras ®
description: Description Dedicated to oil painting, Figueras ® paper offers a texture similar to a canvas. It is easy to carry and can even be laminated on a board. Figueras ® paper features a special barrier that is able to absorb oil, binders and solvents, while allowing the paint to remain on the surface, achieving true-to-life colours without leaving an oily halo on the back of the sheet. This unique paper has a texture that resembles linen and its thickness is perfect for this technique. The paper is ready to use for oil and acrylic without priming or preparation. Figueras ® paper is acid-free and has excellent conservation properties which guarantees the artwork will stand the test of time.

title: Acrylic
description: Description The new quality of Canson ® Acrylic paper is an excellent choice for artists working with the increasingly popular acrylic technique. This paper is distinguished by its thickness and strength, two essential qualities for meeting the demands of this technique. Its new texture replicates the random weave of linen for better paint adhesion. The canvas grain of Canson ® Acrylic is particularly well suited to working with diluted paint applied in thin layers, to create transparent washes. It can also be used to superimpose several layers of opaque, undiluted paint to achieve remarkable impasto effects. This versatility allows artists to bring their creations to life with great freedom of expression. To sum up, Canson ® Acrylic is the ideal paper for acrylic painting. The combination of its unique grain and thickness makes it the preferred choice for demanding artists looking to express their creativity with impeccable quality. Whether you're a professional or a passionate amateur, this paperencourages artistic exploration and the creation of quality works.

title: XL ® Oil and Acrylic
description: Description XL ® Huile et Acrylique is a resilient paper dedicated to oil painting although it is also perfect for achieving opacity and relief effects with acrylic paints. The paper features a special barrier that is able to absorb oil, binders and solvents or acrylic paints while allowing the paint to remain on the surface, in order to get true-to-life colours. XL ® Huile et Acrylique is an acid-free paper and has excellent longevity and will keep for years. Perfect for students, it is the ideal on-the-move paper equally in you studio or in the open air.

title: Graduate Oil and Acrylic
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Oil & Acrylic pads feature thick white paper, with a high-performance, durable and absorbent coating. Containing 20 sheets of 290gsm paper, they are perfect to learn oil and acrylic techniques and achieve optimal results!

title: Palette
description: Description Palette paper offers a convenient alternative to a traditional palette, sparing you the tedious task of cleaning it with solvent. The pads, with their palette-shaped cut-outs, consist of paper coated to allow mixtures of paints (oil or acrylic), with a rigid carton base for optimal ease of use.

title: XL ® Sketch
description: Description XL ® Sketch is a paper that has been specially designed for art students who use large quantities of paper and do lots of sketches. It is an acid-free, ivory-coloured paper with plenty of bulk. It is perfect for quick sketches with pencil, charcoal, red chalk, and pastel. XL ® Sketch is also available as a book. With its large spiral binding and hard cover, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling.

title: XL ® Sketch Extra-white
description: Description XL ® Sketch Extra-white is a paper that has been specially designed for art students who use large quantities of paper and do lots of sketches. It is an acid-free, extra-white paper with plenty of bulk. It is perfect for quick sketches with pencil, charcoal, red chalk, and pastel.

title: XL ® Fluid Mixed Media
description: Description XL ® Fluid Mixed Media has been specially designed for liquid mixed media techniques, including acrylic inks. Perfect for students, it is also an ideal paper for all liquid applications such as inks or markers. XL ® Fluid Mixed Media has the advantage of not curling during use. Its smooth surface and very white colour allow for very good colour rendition.

title: XL ® Mixed Media Textured
description: Description XL ® Mixed Media Textured is specially designed for mixed media techniques. This versatile, heavyweight paper will charm the boldest students. It has the advantage of having two different surfaces: on one side, its special grain allows pigments to grip; the other side is ideal for felt pens and markers. Anything is possible on this all-terrain paper! XL ® Mixed Media Textured is also available as a book. With its large spiral binding and hard cover, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling.

title: XL ® Mixed Media
description: Description XL ® Mixed Media paper is a versatile paper that is easy to correct. It is perfect for a range of techniques including watercolour, acrylic or drawing... Thanks to its pleasant grain and its whiteness, this paper is ideal for all techniques. It is perfect for students and all those who are looking for a good paper at the best price. Canson ® XL ® Mixed Media is also available as a book. With its large spiral binding and hard cover, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling.

title: XL ® Drawing
description: Description XL ® Drawing is a paper specially designed for all dry techniques (pencil, charcoal, pastel, pen). Perfect for students, it is extremely resistant to erasing and scraping. Its light grain is ideal for obtaining sharp and precise lines. XL ® Drawing is also available as a book. With its large spiral binding and hard cover, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling.

title: XL ® Drawing recycled
description: Description For environmentally conscious students, Canson ® has developed XL ® Dessin Recyclé, a white paper made from 100% recycled fibres, which has been specially designed for dry techniques. Its fine grain retains the pigments in order to play with light and shadow.

title: XL ® Sand Grain
description: Description XL ® Sand Grain is a paper made from organic, renewable materials. Its special texture allows pigment retention and is an ideal paper for all dry techniques (including pastel, charcoal, carbon, pencil...). It is a double-sided paper, ideal for students.

title: XL ® Kraft
description: Description XL ® Kraft is a true, pulp-dyed fine art paper. This lined kraft paper is ideal for pencil, charcoal and other dry techniques. It is acid-free and contains no optical brighteners, unlike other equivalent papers on the market. Ideal for students, it is resistant to repeated erasing and scraping.

title: XL ® Black
description: Description XL ® Black is a pulp-dyed paper, specially designed for all dry techniques (pencil, charcoal, pastel, pen). This double-sided paper is perfect for sketching and drawing and its textured surface is ideal for sharp and precise lines with pencil or pastel, while the other, smoother side is ideal for felt-tip and marker. Perfect for students, it is extremely resistant to erasing and scraping.

title: XL ® Marker
description: Description XL ® Marker is a semi-transparent, very white and very smooth layout paper. It is water resistant and has a barrier to prevent ink penetration: the ink remains on the surface and does not go through the paper. Ideal for students, this paper gives excellent colour rendition and allows for uniform flat tints.

title: XL ® Bristol
description: Description XL ® Bristol is an extra white and very smooth paper that is very resistant to repeated scraping and erasing. Perfect for students, it is ideal for precise drawings and allows for sharp lines.

title: XL ® Illustration portfolios
description: Description Designed to support fine art students through all their graphic explorations, Canson ® XL ® drawing boards combine durability, style, and practicality. Their vibrant design, available in two dynamic artistic patterns, mirrors the creative energy of those who carry them. Offered in three generous sizes (from 26 x 33 cm to 52 x 72 cm), these boards allow you to transport sketches, studies, and finished works without folds or damage. Their rigid structure ensures excellent protection, while two sturdy elastic bands keep everything securely in place—even in the busiest corridors of art schools or museums. Inside, acid-free white paper offers a safe haven for artworks, ensuring they won’t deteriorate over time. And true to the brand’s values, Canson ® XL ® drawing boards are FSC ® certified—a concrete commitment to the environment. Thoughtfully designed to meet the real needs of students, Canson ® XL ® boards strike the perfect balance between functionality and aesthetics. An essential tool for those who make art their everyday language.

title: Graduate Mixed Media - White paper
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Mixed Media pads feature white, durable, lightly textured paper. Containing 20 sheets of 200g/m² paper, they are perfect for mixing techniques and achieving optimal results! Canson ® Graduate Mixed Media is also available as a book.

title: Graduate Mixed Media - Natural paper and Grey paper
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Mixed Media Toned paper pads feature durable, double-sided (textured and smooth) paper. This paper has the perfect characteristics for creating depth in your work; by adding white or black, you can easily amplify the shadows and contrasts. The pads contain 20 sheets of 220g/m² paper, and are perfect for mixing techniques and achieving optimal results! Canson ® Graduate Mixed Media Toned paper is also available as a book.

title: Graduate Mixed Media - Black paper
description: Description The Graduate Mixed Media pads have a 240gsm thick and resistant paper, perfect for mixing techniques: sketches with pencils, watercolour, markers… The  deep black paper and its smooth surface bring colours to light, perfect to create beautiful contrasts and results.

title: Graduate Drawing
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Drawing pads feature a durable and lightly textured white drawing paper. The surface stands up to repeated rubbing out without creating lint. These pads contain 30 sheets, perfect for drawing and creating something in vibrant colours! Canson ® Graduate Drawing paper is also available as a book.

title: Graduate Black Drawing
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Black Drawing Paper pads feature 20 sheets of intensely black 120gsm paper. The paper’s smooth surface is ideal for pencil and felt-tip pen drawings. The intense black paper brings out the colours of your creation!

title: Graduate Sketching
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Sketching pads feature a lightweight, slightly bulky white paper. Containing 40 sheets of lightly textured paper on which it's so easy to rub things out, they’re perfect for quick pencil sketches.

title: Graduate Bristol
description: Description Canson ® Graduate Bristol blocks feature extra-smooth 180g/m² paper. Perfect for precision pencil and marker drawings, thanks to the paper’s durable surface.

title: Graduate  Manga Marker Layout
description: Description The Graduate Manga Marker Layout pads have a semi-transparent, ultra-white and extremely smooth paper, ideal for layout work. It withstands water and has a special barrier preventing ink penetration, showing the colours at their best and offering beautilful velvety flat tints. It is suitable for all types of marker, including alcohol and solvent-based markers.

title: Graduate Manga
description: Description The Graduate Manga pads are perfect to practice easily this worldwide famous artistic technique. With a smooth, white and thick paper, resistant to rubbing out and scratching, the pads are a real asset to create Manga! Canson ® Graduate Manga paper is also available as a book.

title: Graduate Lettering Mixed Media
description: Description The Graduate Lettering Mixed Media pads are perfect to practice easily the Lettering technique, the art of drawing letters, playing with textures and graphic elements. The pads will entice watercolour and mixed media lovers, thanks to the lightly textured versatile paper they haare made of.

title: Graduate Lettering Marker
description: Description The Graduate Lettering Marker pads are perfect to practice easily the Lettering technique, the art of drawing letters, playing with textures and graphic elements. They offer a bright white, extra smooth paper to create precise and detailed drawings with marker, pen and ink.

title: Graduate Tracing Paper
description: Description The Graduate Tracing pads allow to practice easily the graphic techniques. The Canson ® tracing paper is highly transparent with a micro-fine satin surface, ideal to realize lines with an excellent definition and contrast. Tubular tips, pencils or pens can be used.

title: Graduate Illustration portfolios
description: Description With its sleek and contemporary design, the Canson ® Graduate drawing board is more than a simple accessory—it’s the first trusted companion of any aspiring artist. Created for students, creative enthusiasts, and pencil-wielding dreamers, it protects sketches, doodles, and early masterpieces thanks to its sturdy cover and two secure elastic closures. Inside, acid-free white paper—a detail purists will love—preserves creations from yellowing and the wear of time. FSC ® certified, it represents a responsible environmental choice without ever compromising on quality. Available in two practical sizes, it’s made to follow you everywhere—from backpack to mobile studio. Lightweight, stylish, and functional, the Canson ® Graduate drawing board supports both your first strokes and your boldest inspirations with grace and reliability. A must-have for anyone starting out in art… with just the right amount of flair.

title: Mixed Media Artist
description: Description Canson ® Mixed Media Artist paper is THE genuine mixed media paper on the market. Its surface is ideal for all techniques as it is resistant to both watercolour and acrylic, but also works with inks and markers. Its exceptional cotton content gives it excellent stability. This professional quality paper is remarkable for its fine texture that readily holds pigments and its natural white colour that gives warmth to your creations. Canson ® Mixed Media Artist is also available as a book . With its hard cover and elegant elastic band closure, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling. Its interior storage pocket is ideal to keep the most precious memories.

title: Mixed Media Essentia
description: Description Canson ® Mixed Media Essentia is a versatile paper that can be used for all techniques (wet and dry). Its texture offers artists a beautiful alternative, that reflects the light and brings brilliance to the pigments. Its tint is ideal for a harmonious rendering of colours and its surface results in accentuated colour contrasts.

title: Imagine
description: Description Imagine is a mixed media paper that offers an excellent feel, a cross between silk and velvet. It features a beautiful natural white finish. The paper is ideal for use with graphite, felt pen and markers and it also lends itself to all kinds of wet techniques such as watercolour, gouache, ink or mixed dry and wet techniques. The colour and the lightly grained aspect of its surface allows for a harmonious rendering of contrasting line delicacy and strength.

title: C à grain ® 180 & 224 g/m²
description: Description The name "C" à grain ® refers to this paper’s slightly grained texture that allows the artist to quickly achieve subtle effects of depth as well as shading between shadow and light. Its is perfect for artistic drawing. This versatile paper is suitable for dry techniques such as pencil, pastel, charcoal and sanguine and watercolour techniques. The surface inspires the artist's imagination to travel to the land of creation where shapes and colours can develop fully and permanently. The premium quality of this paper allows for corrections and modification without damaging the fibres of the paper and insures an excellent conservation of your work over time. Canson "C" à grain ® is also available as a book. With its hard cover and elegant elastic band closure, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling. Its interior storage pocket is ideal to keep the most precious memories.

title: 1557 ® 180g/m²
description: Description Hiding beneath its apparant simplicity, 1557 ® is a rather sophisticated paper. The grain is neither too smooth nor too prominent, providing a subtle surface perfect for sketching, drawing and other dry techniques. This paper is ideal for precise technical drawings with graphite or coloured pencils. 1557 ® paper retains pigments well and allows unlimited shading and gradients. This bright white paper is designed to accentuate contrast and allows colours to really stand out. Both surface and internally sized, 1557 ® paper offers a remarkable resistance to repeated erasing without degradation.

title: "C" à grain ® 125 gsm
description: Description The name "C" à grain ® refers to this paper’s slightly grained texture that allows the artist to quickly achieve subtle effects of depth as well as shading between shadow and light. Its is perfect for artistic drawing. This paper is ideal for monochrome pencils but is also suitable for other dry tools. The surface inspires the artist's imagination to travel to the land of creation where shapes and colours can develop fully and permanently. The premium quality of this paper allows for corrections and modification without damaging the fibres of the paper and insures an excellent conservation of your work over time.

title: Toned "C" à grain ® 250 gsm
description: Description The name "C" à grain ® refers to this paper’s slightly grained texture that allows the artist to quickly achieve subtle effects of depth as well as shading between shadow and light. Its is perfect for artistic drawing. This versatile paper is suitable for dry techniques such as pencil, pastel, charcoal and sanguine and wet techniques as the paper remains flat. The surface inspires the artist's imagination to travel to the land of creation where shapes and colours can develop fully and permanently. The premium quality of this paper allows for corrections and modification without damaging the fibres of the paper and insures an excellent conservation of your work over time. Shades of grey or yellow ochre highlight your works, revealing contrasts and accentuating the light.

title: Canson ® "C" à grain ® Art Book
description: Description Give free rein to your creativity by illustrating your thoughts in a sketchbook, for impeccable quality results. The "C" à grain ® sketchbook has a natural whiteness and a fine, even grained surface. It is suited to all illustration techniques, including pencil, pastel, pen, felt-tip, watercolour, etc. A sketchbook for recreating the world Thanks to the purity of its white paper, the sketchbook allows you to produce illustrations with more vivid colours, making them stand out more clearly. It's the ideal medium for sketching your ideas, creating portraits, illustrating beautiful landscapes, and more. The "C" à grain ® sketchbook is also great for quickly sketching an idea when you see something that inspires you in the moment, before working on it again later at a more leisurely pace. Whatever your skill level in illustration, all you need is a pencil, an eraser and your sketchbook! Explore your artistic senses Designers need a reliable medium to give free rein to their talent and creativity in the best possible conditions. They can count on the premium quality of our sketchbook, designed to make it easy for every artist to express themselves on the medium. The Canson ® "C" à grain ® paper is perfectly resistant to erasers, so you can retouch your drawing as many times as you like, for a result that's true to your artistic style! Sketch wherever you are With its practical format, this sketchbook will be your companion wherever you go. It's the perfect medium for scribbling whenever you feel inspired, wherever you are: on a café terrace, on a park bench, in a railway station, etc. The sketchbook lets you capture all your ideas on the spot, so you can be more creative than ever!

title: 1557 ® 120gsm
description: Description Hiding beneath its apparant simplicity, 1557 ® is a rather sophisticated paper. The grain is neither too smooth nor too prominent, providing a subtle surface perfect for sketching, drawing and other dry techniques. This paper is ideal for precise technical drawings with graphite or hard leads. 1557 ® paper retains pigments well and allows unlimited shading and gradients. This bright white paper is designed to accentuate contrast and allows colours to really stand out. Both surface and internally sized, 1557 ® paper offers a remarkable resistance to repeated erasing without degradation. Canson ® 1557 ® is also available as a book. With its hard cover and elegant elastic band closure, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling. Its interior storage pocket is ideal to keep the most precious memories.

title: Canson ® 1557 ® Art Book
description: Description Perfectly suited to all dry techniques, the sketchbook enables you to produce highly accurate illustrations, as well as a "first draft" of all your ideas. This practical sketchbook is ideal for anyone who wants to draw anywhere, without the risk of damaging the paper. The sketchbook, the ideal medium for your sketches Keep it with you every day, so you can create your drawings away from your studio: in particular, you can use it to scribble down one of your on-the-spot ideas, or to put on paper the basics of a more complex creation. Bring all your ideas to life Indispensable for your first drafts and refining your artistic ideas, the Canson ® 1557 ® art book gives you the opportunity to gather all your ideas in one place. It prevents you from misplacing your drawings, as can so often be the case with loose-leaf paper. You can use it to jot down inspirational phrases, draw a landscape or a face you don't want to forget and more. Whatever the context, the 1557® art book lets you capture your inspiration on the fly, because its format, with its hard cover, small pocket and elegant elastic closure, makes it easy to carry around! Define your artistic style The sketchbook is the perfect accessory for trying out new illustration techniques and discovering new artistic horizons. It has a very neutral grained surface, and its high-quality paper lends itself perfectly to the use of dry techniques. This makes it ideal for technical illustrations, as its whiteness gives excellent colour contrast. The sketchbook is suitable for both experienced artists and beginners, and gives you absolute creative freedom. You don't need to worry about layout when using your sketchbook, because its main purpose is to let your creativity flow!

title: Mi-Teintes ®
description: Description Available in 50 colours, Mi-Teintes ® has all the characteristics of a genuine art paper. Buffered, manufactured acid-free in a neutral environment, it offers excellent protection against ageing. Pulp-dyed, colours are light-resistant and its high cotton content makes it both robust and flexible. With its two surfaces, Mi-Teintes ® has nothing but good sides! One side has a honeycomb grain, contributing to its personality, that easily retains the pigments. The other side has a fine grain, ideal for pencil and charcoal. Mi-Teintes ® meets all your requirements and is also suitable for art and craft. Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® is also available as a book. With its hard cover and elegant elastic band closure, it is the ideal companion to enhance one's creativity when travelling. Its interior storage pocket is ideal to keep the most precious memories.

title: Mi-Teintes ® Touch
description: Description With its finely textured micro-abrasive surface (thanks to a sand finish), Mi-Teintes® Touch is the ideal paper for working with pastels. It retains pigments particularly well and it is easy to superimpose layers of pastel. It shows colours at their best and has excellent resistance to light and time. Mi-Teintes® Touch can also withstand wet techniques.

title: Colorline ®
description: Description Canson ® Colorline ® coloured papers are versatile and ideal for any creative idea thanks to the two weights and the beautiful pulp-dyed colours range. Canson ® Colorline ® coloured papers are double sided. The smooth side is ideal for felt and marker pens whilst the grained side is good for pencil, charcoal and pastels, with a nice sensation of depth. Resitant to rubbing out and scratching, the Canson ® Colorline ® papers are available in 150gsm and 220gsm, sheets small and large sizes, and assorted colours pads. The Canson ® Colorline ® box completes the range. Solid and fitted with an integrated cover, this box of assorted colours is ideal for clean storage and optimal conservation of the sheets. Canson ® Colorline ® coloured papers are made in France.

title: Ingres Vidalon ®
description: Description With its high cotton content, Ingres Vidalon ® is an authentic art paper with a range of lightfast colours. Manufactured acid-free in a neutral environment (apart from the black colour), buffered and mould-resistant, Ingres Vidalon ® benefits from the best protection against ageing. Its traditional laid surface grips to and retains pigments without being abrasive. It is the ideal paper for pastel portraits or sanguine studies.

title: Ingres Ecoles
description: Description Ingres Ecoles is an authentic art paper with a natural white colour. Its traditional laid surface grips to and retains pigments without being abrasive. It is the ideal paper for dry techniques sur as pencil, pastel, charcoal, sanguine…

title: 180° Art Book™
description: Description This Canson ® 180° Art Book™ of 80 sheets with rounded corners can be opened completely flat for unlimited artistic expression. Elegant and solid black cover. Magnetic closing system. Durable Canson ® Crob'Art ® permanent paper (96 gsm) : white, low basis weight (96 gsm) paper, with slight bulk and fine texture, Canson ® Art Book™ 180° paper is specially designed for studies and quick sketches in pencil, charcoal, lead pencil and sanguine. It even withstands light washes and is very easy to erase.

title: Universal Art Book™
description: Description With its round corners it is easier to transport and more durable. It also has a very useful pocket for loose papers/items.Its elastic closing system is innovative: being attached to the interior the elastic does not hang loose, maintaining its aesthetic aspect. With its 112 sheets and Canson ® Crob'Art ® permanent drawing paper , Canson ® Universal Art Book™ is all purpose and durable in all senses. White, low basis weight (96 gsm) paper, with slight bulk and fine texture, Canson ® Crob'Art ® paper is specially designed for studies and quick sketches in pencil, charcoal, lead pencil and sanguine. It even withstands light washes. Canson ® Crob'Art® is very easy to erase.

title: The Wall
description: Description Innovative and totally opaque, Canson ® has developed The Wall, a special paper for illustrators, designers, graffiti artists... It acts as a wall, resisting alcohol markers and spray cans. It does not bleed through, even with multiple layers. Combining its smooth surface with the use of fine or thick markers, it gives sharp and precise lines. An extra white paper, it allows for uniform colour and colour contrast. The Wall is double-sided and can be used on both sides.

title: Illustration Manga
description: Description Canson ® Illustration Manga is a specific paper for illustration, manga, comics (pencil, ink, wash, felt pen, fountain pen...). Its weight and composition allow for easy corrections. Its smooth surface is resistant to scraping, adhesive tape and erasing. Its texture is pleasant to work with, providing both a fine art feel and a smooth surface that results in clean, precise lines. The white colour provides excellent colour contrast.

title: Illustration Bristol
description: Description Canson ® Illustration Bristol is a very white, extra smooth and very resistant satin paper. It withstands repeated corrections by scraping or erasing. It is ideal for pencils, pens, washing, tubular tip ink and airbrush work. It is also effective for all techniques requiring a smooth surface and precise lines.

title: Illustration
description: Description Canson ® Illustration is a smooth drawing paper that is perfect for flowing, clean and precise lines without smearing. The ink does not run or bleed through. The paper allows for shadow effects by superimposing the lines. Its pure white colour provides excellent colour contrast. The paper is perfect for illustration or technical drawing. It is particularly recommended for all types of felt pens and inks, but also for pencil, washes.... It is very easy to correct by scraping.

title: "C" à grain ® - Graphic Arts
description: Description Perfect for artistic drawing, "C" à grain ® paper has a slightly grained texture that allows the artist to quickly achieve subtle effects of depth as well as shading between shadow and light. This versatile paper is suitable for dry techniques such as pencil, pastel, charcoal and sanguine and wet techniques as the paper remains flat. The premium quality of this paper allows for corrections and modification without damaging the fibres of the paper and insures an excellent conservation of your work over time.

title: Marker Layout - Graphic Arts
description: Description This paper is semi-transparent, ultra-white and extremely smooth, for layout work. It withstands water and has a special barrier preventing ink penetration, so pigment stays on the surface and does not come through the paper. Marker paper shows colours at their best and permits velvety flat tints. It is suitable for all types of marker, including spirit and solvent-based markers.

title: Black - Graphic Arts
description: Description Deep black paper, smooth, stock-dyed and withstanding erasing and scraping. Ideal for drawing, pasting, modelling and presentations.

title: Calque - Graphic Arts
description: Description Canson ® Tracing paper features a satin surface and a high transparency. It allows for perfect definition and contrast of lines drawn with a tubular tip ink drawing pen, pencil or pen.

title: Edition
description: Description Canson ® Edition is 100% cotton and complies with the ISO 9706 standard on permanence, a guarantee of optimal conservation. It has the advantage of having a different texture on its two sides, one smooth, the other fine grain. A versatile product, this art paper is ideal for drawing and traditional art printing techniques.

title: 100% cotton Canson ® Museum Backing Boards
description: Description Untextured cardboards that have been laminated together in multiple plies using neutral glue. The 100% cotton Canson® Museum Backing Boards provide the best possible conservation quality. They are made from 100% cotton, acid-free, with an alkaline buffer. They comply with the ISO 9706 conservation standard and with the photographic activity test (PAT). They have been treated against mould and have an ivory white aspect. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Conservation Backing Boards
description: Description Untextured cardboards that have been laminated together in multiple plies using neutral glue, they are easy to cut. They are acid-free, have an alkaline buffer and comply with the ISO 9706 conservation standard, they have no optical whitener and have been treated against mould. Our Canson ® Conservation Backing Boards are available in a number of thicknesses and in 2 colours : a pure white and an antique white which is particularly suited for prints, engravings and ancient documents.

title: Barrier paper
description: Description Thin ultra-white, smooth paper without optical brightening agents, acid-free, alkaline buffered and mould resistant. May be used to isolate an item from an acid base, cover a bevelled edge in framing, make inserts and hinges, or make archive folders.

title: Permanent paper
description: Description Permanent paper is a smooth paper without optical brightening agents, alkaline buffered and mould resistant (for white and bis colours). It complies with ISO 9706 requirements. It is used for light museum mountings (back and top layer), or for making sleeves and archive folders. The latest addition to this range, the grey roll is easy to handle and allows to make large protective sleeves. The colour is low-soiling and stable.

title: Blotting paper
description: Description Essential for drying or restoring drawings and ink-based documents, the blotting paper contains cotton and is highly absorbent. In addition to protecting hand writing works, it is also often used as a desk blotter, for framing or for stamp collections, for making herbariums, and generally to absorb medium excess whatever the artistic practice. The blotting paper is available in a small size so that it can be slipped into your travel book.

title: Illustration portfolio
description: Description Available with customisable exterior, in varnished brown or with the famous Annonay green and black paper, Canson® Illustration portfolios are suitable for all budgets and tailor made for the storage and transportation of artwork. Studio - Annonay green Specially for Fine Arts students. Annonay exterior paper with white acid-free interior paper, protects artworks perfectly. Gusseted back covered with black linen and with two elastic straps for closure. Classic - Annonay green Specially for Fine Arts, the Classic range is conceived for the storage of the greatest artworks. Exteriors are covered with edged and varnished Annonay paper, with white acid-free paper for interior protection. Black linen gusseted back with four corner protections. Closed with three black silk ribbons. Tendance Similar to the Studio range, but with an edged brown varnished exterior and kraft paper interior, making it a true decorative object in itself. Customisable Ideal for small budgets. Customisable grey cover without edging, gusseted black linen back with four corner protections, closes with two black elastic straps. Available in four sizes, suitable for the transport of sketches.

title: Mi-Teintes ® mount boards
description: Description The Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® drawing paper with its unique honeycomb grain, either plain or mottled, laminated to Canson ® Conservation board. The Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® mount board is acid-free and complies with the ISO 9706 standard on permanence, guaranteeing optimal conservation. The white core of the board is very soft, allowing easy direct cutting with a 45° bevel. This is an ideal stiff medium both for pastel drawings and for making framing mats. The Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® mount board is a versatile product, meeting the requirements of art framing (conservation, light resistance, neutral colours, etc.) and creative framing (honeycomb texture, bright colours).

title: Ingres Vidalon ® mount boards
description: Description Canson ® Ingres Vidalon ® mount boards are made of laid Canson ® Ingres Vidalon ® drawing paper, laminated to Canson ® Conservation board. Canson ® Ingres Vidalon ® mount board is acid-free and complies with the ISO 9706 standard on permanence, the guarantee of optimal conservation. The core of the Canson ® Ingres Vidalon ® mount board is very soft, allowing easy direct cutting with a 45° bevel. Much as the Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® mount board, this is both an ideal stiff medium for pastel drawings and for making mat-boards for framing. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Concerto ® mount boards
description: Description Canson ® Concerto ® mount boards alloy a varnished paper with a canvas-like grain, laminated to Canson ® Conservation board. White, acid-free core, allowing easy cutting. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Kraft-lined board
description: Description Canson ® Conservation board lined with off-white Kraft. For use as a direct backing: one white side (in contact with the artwork), the other lined with (acidic) Kraft paper, the board being thick enough to act as a protection.

title: Backing Boards
description: Description Canson ® offers a range of cardboards for making framing backs or any other handicraft requiring a stiff medium (backing, displays, mock-ups, document supports, etc.). The Canson ® Cellulose cardboard made with neutral mechanical pulp (acid-free) can be used as backing or packaging... The Canson ® Grey cardboard is made from recycled papers with the risk of residual acidity. If used as back cardboards, we advise separating it from artwork with a sheet of acid-free paper or cardboard.

title: Studio boards
description: Description Canson ® Studio is a range of backing boards for drawing, available in various thicknesses. It is available with four different finishes: Canson ® Studio Eco + , mat white coated paper, lightweight, bonded to grey cardboard Canson ® Studio Eco, lightweight, mat and ivory white, bonded back and front to cellulose board Canson ® Studio Bristol, smooth, glued to cellulose board Canson ® Studio Lavis, fine-grain drawing paper, glued to cellulose board.

title: Carton Plume ®
description: Description Being of highest quality, these solid and lightweight boards are made up of a polyurethane base-material, compatible with all types of adhesive (with or without solvent), covered with a layer of matte paper on each side. Available in white or black, in Domino version (one black side, the other grey; plastic-coated finish unaffected by adhesives and moisture-resistant) or with one or two adhesive surfaces, Canson ® Carton Plume ® will satisfy all your creative wishes. Known for its technical qualities, Polyurethane Canson ® Carton Plume ® gives your work a longer life. It is perfectly flat, dimensionally stable and resistant to high temperatures. Its high density gives it a much appreciated rigidity and makes it easy to crop precisely and cleanly. Ideal for all types of work, from the most simple to the most sophisticated: adhesive support, decoration, 3D modelling, sign-making, exhibition signage... This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® Art Book
description: Description The Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® art book offers you a premium quality support that will suit all your artistic inspirations. Internationally renowned for its incomparable quality, the Mi-Teintes paper used for this Canson ® art book has been tinted during manufacture. It has a high cotton content, making it mechanically strong and pleasant to the touch. The Mi-Teintes ® paper in this art book has two sides with different textures. One side has a "honeycomb" grain, typical of Mi-Teintes ® paper, while the other side is smoother with a finer grained texture. Whichever side you choose, the art book offers excellent hold, trapping the pigments without damaging the paper. This type of paper is perfect for meticulous work, during which various layers can be elegantly superimposed by the illustrator. Let your imagination run wild Whether you're a fan of coloured pencils, charcoal or pastels, this Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® art book is the ideal medium for bringing superb intensity to all your colour pigments. More versatile than ever, it can be used for any type of illustration requiring gradients or colour blends. You can use it to draw a landscape, a nude portrait, a seascape, flowers, a still life and much more. It suits any situation and sets the scene for an infinite range of artistic possibilities! Paint your ideas on a robust surface Mi-Teintes ® paper boasts excellent strength and guarantees you long-lasting conservation. It is very lightfast. The Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® art book is particularly suited to artists who use fine art techniques: pastels, red chalk, charcoal, gouache, etc. Give complete freedom to your artistic inspiration, for a result that's totally faithful to your imagination!

title: Satin Tracing Paper
description: Description Canson ® satin tracing paper features an extra smooth texture that provides excellent definition and precision. Ideal for all types of technical drawings, it is suitable for pencils, pens and tubular tip ink.

title: Sketching Tracing Paper
description: Description Canson ® sketching tracing paper features an extra smooth texture that provides excellent definition and precision. Ideal for all types of technical drawings, it is suitable for pencils, pens and tubular tip ink. A 5x5mm graduation is printed on the cover of the pad, allowing you to create sketches with accurate proportions or 3D drawings.

title: Opalux
description: Description Opalux is a white drawing paper with a smooth and translucent texture that provides excellent definition and precision. Ideal for drawing, it is also suitable for decoration, printing and image processing.

title: Polyester film 75 microns
description: Description This film offers excellent transparency properties and both sides of the film are specially treated to guarantee the adhesion of both pencil and ink. The film is tearproof as well as being resistant to moisture making it extremely stable and easy to handle and store. Ideal for technical drawings including high precision work and particularly for work that is handled frequently. Only for use with appropriate pencils, inks and erasers.

title: Millimetre Drawing Paper
description: Description Canson ® Millimetre Paper is a smooth white paper. Easy to erase, the paper is particularly suitable for precision drawing and quality work. The Millimetre print also features a more prominent line at 5 cm intervals for better reading of work.

title: Drawing books
description: Description The Canson® Sketch and Notes pads combine notetaking and drawing to make revisions clearer and more enjoyable! Made of white bristol paper, the 5x5 squared side allows to take notes while the other side, plain white, is suitable to draw, visualize and quickly see the main ideas. Already perforated, the sheets are easy to store and file.

title: Drawing loose-leaf
description: Description The Canson ® Sketch and Notes pads combine notetaking and drawing to make revisions clearer and more enjoyable! Made of white bristol paper, the 5x5 squared side allows to take notes while the other side, plain white, is suitable to draw, visualize and quickly see the main ideas. Already perforated, the sheets are easy to store and file.

title: Drawing loose-leaf pad
description: Description The Canson ® Sketch and Notes pads combine notetaking and drawing to make revisions clearer and more enjoyable! Made of white bristol paper, the 5x5 squared side allows to take notes while the other side, plain white, is suitable to draw, visualize and quickly see the main ideas. Already perforated, the sheets are easy to store and file.

title: Creative Studio portfolio
description: Description Combining the many advantages of the portfolio with trendy designs! These portfolios offer optimal protection of artworks thanks to a white acid-free interior paper. With a gusseted back covered with black linen and two elastic straps for closure, they are perfect for storage, conservation and transportation of the drawings.

title: Storage folders
description: Description The polypropylene storage folders are essential to carry artistic works. They ideally protect the paper thanks to their rigidity while being lightweight, tear-resistant and flexible. With two different sizes, they are ideally designed to store A4, 24 x 32 cm and A3 documents. Made in France.

title: Superior crepe paper
description: Description The superior crepe paper is both heavy-weight and tear resistant, which is essential for Art & Crafts. With an above average stretching capacity of 130%, the paper is very expandable and available in a range of 12 beautiful and vivid colours.

title: Standard crepe paper
description: Description The Standard Crepe paper brings together resistance and ease of use in all situations. Having a stretching capacity of 50%, it is expandable and soft to the touch. Ideal for all creative ideas thanks to its large range of colours.

title: Metallic crepe paper
description: Description The Metallic Crepe paper offers a high grammage (44 gsm) and a high stretch capacity (90%). Particularly resistant and flexible, it is ideal for creating decorations for festive occasions thanks to the three metallic colours : gold, silver and copper.

title: Crepe paper - Leisure set
description: Description The Crepe paper, Leisure Set is available in pack of 10 sheets per colour or assorted colours. Easy to use, the 14 colours will give fancy to the creative ideas!

title: Kraft paper
description: Description The Canson ® Kraft Paper is stock-dyed and tough. It is ideal for customized packaging but also decorative work and drawings. Available in brown or white, it is also declined in seven bright colours. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Corrugated Cardboard
description: Description The range of Canson ® Corrugated Cardboard, declined in sheets and rolls, adds a touch of fantasy to the cards or creatives ideas. The grooving and the various colours (including gold and silver) give volume and shine to the creations. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Silk paper
description: Description The Canson ® Silk Paper has no folds and offers pulp-dyed colours for better color preservation over time. Its transparency makes it ideal for Art & Crafts and the three metallic colours, which complete the range, make it ideal for creating decorations for festive occasion. The Canson ® Silk Paper is available in 5m rolls to create without limit and in 50x75cm sheets, ready to use. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Polycristalline Film
description: Description The Canson ® Polycristalline film is often associated with silk paper for the original and colorful packaging. It can be used under moist conditions to wrap beautiful flowers, but also under dry conditions to display gifts.

title: Kids Drawing
description: Description Ideal for being creative anywhere: the pads can be used for drawing wherever you want. With 30 sheets of lightweight white drawing paper, the pads cans be used for drawing with pencils and coloured pencils. Also available as a roll for a creative support without limit and as a pad which integrates an easel, ideal for drawing on a vertical support or to display the finished work. And for the inspiring kids with a lot of imagination, discover the Kids Jumbo Packs! Made in France, the Canson ® Drawing Pads for Kids are the perfect partner to spark the imagination and develop the creativity!

title: Kids Painting
description: Description The Canson ® Painting Pads for Kids are perfect to be initiated into painting just like grown up! Made of a genuine Canson ® painting paper with a strong weight and a smooth texture, they are ideal to use gouache without the risk of going through the paper. The A3 format is adapted especially for finger and sponge painting. The A4 format can be used wherever you want! Made in France, the Canson ® Painting Pads for Kids are the perfect partner to spark the imagination and develop the creativity! This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Kids Colour creation
description: Description The Canson ® Creation Pads for Kids are made of a Canson ® papers assortment with intense colours, ideal for drawing and creating, at home or during the holidays. The Canson ® A4 Colour Creation pad is composed of paper with a low weight, easy to handle or fold. The Canson ® 24x32 cm Colour Creation pad gets a higher paper weight allowing picture framing and 3D creations. Made in France, the Canson ® Creation Pads for Kids are the perfect partner to spark the imagination and develop the creativity! This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Kids Black creation
description: Description Thanks to its intense black and its thick paper, the Canson ® Kids Black Creation pad is ideal for picture framing or to enhance artwork using light colours. Made in France, the Canson ® Black Creation Pads for Kids are the perfect partner to spark the imaginationand develop the creativity! This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: My first scribbles
description: Description Check out the My First Scribbles blocks. They're ideal for children who are learning about and exploring the pleasures of drawing, painting and creative activity. The blocks are made up of Canson drawing paper, and are made in France. They're specially designed for trying out ideas, rubbing out and then having another go thanks to their hard-wearing surface and heavy weight. Perfect for early-stage drawings made using colour pencils, felt tips and even for painting! This 'all-terrain' paper is acid-free, and lasts a long time - so you get to lovingly preserve their drawings.

title: Digital Everyday Gloss
description: Description The Canson Digital Everyday portfolio is designed for photographers looking for papers that are easy to use and offer a variety of uses. Everyday Gloss 200 gsm is ideal for a range of activities including photo albums, portfolios or school, work or college projects.

title: Digital Everyday Matt
description: Description Canson Digital Everyday Matt 180gsm is ideal for all printing projects that need crisp clean text, and good colour reproduction including mailings, informational signs or posters, business flyers or school projects.

title: Digital Everyday Double Sided Matt
description: Description Creating portfolios could not be easier for this smooth double-sided matt paper. Canson Digital Everyday Double-sided Matt 170gsm offers sharp graphics and text, with excellent colour reproduction, and is ideal for creating greeting cards, scrapbooking, mailings, invitations or business flyers.

title: Digital Premium High Gloss
description: Description With today’s technology, capturing memories has never been easier and now with the Canson® Digital Premium paper 255gsm these precious moments in time can be shared with friends and family. The Premium High Gloss paper has the look and feel of a traditional photograph and is ideal for creating family photo albums or prints for framing. The smaller 4” x 6” size is perfect for creating greeting cards, post cards or mini portfolio as gifts.

title: Digital Premium Lustre
description: Description With today’s technology, capturing memories has never been easier and now with the Canson® Digital Premium paper 255gsm these precious moments in time can be shared with friends and family. The Premium Lustre has a subtle finish, often used by professional photographers as it is ideal for framing or displaying prints, as there is no glare. The smaller 4” x 6” size is perfect for creating greeting cards, post cards or mini portfolio as gifts.

title: Digital Creative T-shirt Transfer White
description: Description Canson ® Digital Iron-on Transfers are extremely easy to use and are compatible with all popular inkjet printers. Available for printing onto white fabrics, it could not be easier to add your favourite image, drawing or artwork onto any cotton garment such as a t-shirt or baseball cap.

title: Digital Creative T-shirt Transfer Black
description: Description Canson ® Digital Iron-on Transfers are extremely easy to use and are compatible with all popular inkjet printers. Available for printing onto  dark fabrics, it could not be easier to add your favourite image, drawing or artwork onto any cotton garment such as a t-shirt or baseball cap.

title: Digital Creative Photo Stickers
description: Description Canson ® Digital Photo Stickers are completely clear with a double-sided adhesive which means that they are not visible once attached to the photo. The stickers are square clear film and supplied on a roll, so they are easy to handle and apply. Ideal for creating photo albums, portfolios, scrapbooking or projects.

title: Digital Ultimate
description: Description The Canson ® Digital Ultimate range presents true high resolution photographic paper, giving long lasting professional quality prints. This microporous media provides an unrivalled sharpness of image, vibrant colours, deep blacks, as well as faithful reproduction of the intermediate hues. Their weight is ideal for the preservation of the most precious photographs (for framing or displaying...). Compatible with all inkjet printers, as well as pigment or dye inks, with the ease of a rapid drying time and water resistance. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Digital Performance
description: Description The Canson ® Digital Performance range of photographic paper is perfect for high quality photographic prints : providing high contrast, saturated colours and a precise photographic rendering. Canson ® Digital Performance is the ideal range for repeated manipulation of prints, creation of visuals for communication purposes, and for making photo albums. Compatible with all inkjet printers, as well as pigment or dye inks, with the ease of a rapid drying time and water resistance. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: Digital Everyday
description: Description The Canson ® Digital Everyday range of photographic paper is a support which has an exceptional whiteness that provides vibrant and natural colours with excellent contrast. Ideal for regular use and the perfect means for economical prints with photographic rendering. Compatible with all inkjet printers, as well as pigment or dye inks, with the ease of a rapid drying time and water resistance. This product is unavailable in Australia.

title: ARCHES® 88
description: Description Made of 100% cotton, it offers an ultra-smooth surface finish and a soft and supple feel to the touch. ARCHES® 88 has a pure white tone and is completely free of any optical brighteners (OBAs). The unique inkjet receiving layer produces prints with superb colour rendition, deep blacks and natural whites offering photographers, artists and printmakers the opportunity to create images with a superb tonal range, excellent highlights and mid-tones. ARCHES® 88 is a prestigious printmaking paper and offers artists, printmakers and photographers alike the ability to create digital fine art prints on an authentic ARCHES® paper for both limited and open edition work. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/archesr-88

description: Description BFK Rives® Pure White is a 100% cotton paper which has a perfectly balanced soft grain that brings out the detail in every image. This unique printmaking paper base is manufactured on a traditional cylinder mould press at the ARCHES® paper mill, one of the oldest papermakers in France. As a result of using 100% cotton and the time-honoured manufacturing process, the paper has a very soft and supple feel. The paper has a pure white tone and is completely free of any optical brighteners (OBAs). The unique inkjet receiving layer produces prints with superb colour rendition, deep blacks and pure whites offering photographers, artists and printmakers the opportunity to create images with superb tonal range, excellent highlights and mid-tones. BFK Rives® Pure White is a prestigious paper and offers artists, printmakers and photographers alike the ability to create digital fine art prints on an authentic ARCHES® paper for both limited and open edition work. This unique printmaking paper base is manufactured on a traditional cylinder mould machine at the ARCHES® paper mill, one of the oldest papermakers in France. title: ARCHES ® Aquarelle Rag
description: Description ARCHES ® Aquarelle is recognised by artists as one of the most prestigious watercolour papers with a history that spans many centuries. ARCHES ® master papermakers have been producing very high-quality fine art papers since 1492, and today ARCHES® is the only paper mill in France using a traditional cylinder mould process for all its papers, including ARCHES ® Aquarelle Rag. Using the traditional watercolour base, the paper has an even natural grain and a felt-marked finish. ARCHES ® Aquarelle Rag is manufactured using 100% cotton which contributes to the paper’s natural beauty and feel. The pure white base does not contain any optical brightening agents (OBAs). The unique inkjet receiving layer produces prints with superb colour rendition, deep blacks and pure whites offering photographers, artists and printmakers the opportunity to create images with superb tonal range, excellent highlights and mid-tones. ARCHES ® Aquarelle Rag is a prestigious paper and offers artists, printmakers and photographers alike the ability to create digital fine art prints on an authentic ARCHES ® paper for both limited and open edition work. title: Rag Photographique
description: Description Canson® Infinity Rag Photographique is a 100% cotton museum grade white Fine Art and photo paper. The exceptional smooth white tone is achieved during manufacturing by introducing natural minerals to the process. It has been developed to address the need for continued longevity requirements in the Digital Fine Art market. Rag Photographique offers a unique extra smooth surface with a sensual feel. It also provides one of the highest achievable Dmax currently available on the market, making it ideal for fine art photography as well as fine art printmaking. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/rag-photographique

title: Rag Photographique II
description: Description Utilising the latest proprietary inkjet coating, Canson ® Infinity Rag Photographique II offers an improved image performance including excellent black density, exceptional detail and a rich tonal range, whilst retaining the original aesthetic of the paper. Produced by the papermakers at the Canson Mill in Annonay, France, Rag Photographique II is 100% cotton, with a smooth sensual feel to the paper. The paper is museum grade and contains no artificial brightening agents, also called OBAs. This museum grade paper offers deep blacks, excellent image sharpness and detail, optimum colour graduation and its smooth matt surface is ideal photographers, artists and printmakers that are looking to produce colour or black & white art reproductions. Rag Photographique Duo is the ideal Fine Art paper to create stunning photographs, prestigious portfolios and photo albums. This exceptional paper is ideal for fine art prints and photographs and gives them a very prestigious aura. description: Description Canson® Infinity Edition Etching Rag is a 100% cotton Fine Art paper with a smooth texture, reminiscent of the original genuine etching and printmaking papers. The paper has the purest white tone available on the market, without any Optical Brightening Agents, also called OBAs. Optical Brightening Agents are artificial brighteners that deteriorate in time. Canson® Edition Etching Rag offers a high paper shade stability and a resistance to aging by using natural minerals. This museum-grade paper provides deep blacks, excellent image sharpness, optimum colour graduation and its unique slight grain makes it ideal for printing detailed work, colour photographs and exceptional black and white portraits. Made from 100% cotton, this fine art paper has a soft fine grain texture, reminiscent of the original genuine etching and printmaking papers. title: Velin Museum Rag
description: Description The Velin has been chosen throughout the centuries to make lithographs, intaglio etchings, aqua fortis etchings and collotypes by world-renowned artists. Canson® Infinity Velin Museum Rag is now available on the market for digital art and photography printing. This paper is naturally age-resistant and has a unique fine-grained, smooth surface and structure and offers a pure white tone without OBAs. It is ideal for sophisticated photographs and museum-grade applications, as well as fine Art printmaking. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/velin-museum-rag

title: Aquarelle Rag
description: Description This genuine 100% rag, watercolour paper possesses the unique structure, surface texture and warm white tone that demanding artists expect from a traditional Fine Art paper. This paper complies with the highest archival standards and is extremely age resistant. Canson® Infinity Aquarelle Rag gives a unique and unrivalled character to the Fine Art reproduction of traditional artwork and photographs. title: Platine Fibre Rag
description: Description Canson ® Infinity Platine Fibre Rag is the combination of the premium 100% cotton Platinum paper that Canson has supplied for many years to the original Platinum and Platine photographic market, with the latest microporous coating, making the traditional darkroom paper now available for your digital printing. Setting the benchmark for Digital Darkroom papers, Platine Fibre Rag provides the aesthetic and feel of the original F-Type Baryta Fibre paper, having a true pure white tone without using optical brighteners that are known to affect the longevity of digitally produced images. Platine Fibre Rag’s extremely high Dmax and exceptional grey tones make it the product of choice for the more discerning black and white as well as colour photographic prints. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/platine-fibre-rag

title: Baryta Photographique II
description: Description The next generation of Baryta Photographique, offers photographers and printers the opportunity of creating a photograph with the true look and feel of a traditional darkroom print with improved handling and finishing characteristics. Baryta Photographique II has a true 100% barium sulphate layer (baryta) which offers exceptional contrast and detail as well as a wide colour gamut. The product has an extremely high D-Max (black point) to produce black and white images with depth and clarity and colour images with vibrancy and intensity. The new generation product has a more structured surface aspect which is reminiscent of the traditional fibre-based darkroom papers and a fine satin finish. With excellent handling characteristics, Baryta Photographique II can be used in a wide range of applications and is offered in sheets and rolls up to 60” wide. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/baryta-photographique-ii

title: Baryta Photographique II Matt
description: Description The Canson Infinity Baryta Photographique II Matt paper has an extremely smooth surface with a totally matt finish which, due to the lack of grain interference, accentuates the detail in the printed image. The matt surface also has no light reflection from any viewing angle, ideal for photographers or artists that wish to display their final work. Although Baryta Photographique II Matt is classed as a digital darkroom photo paper, it should be printed using Matt Black ink as opposed to Photo Black ink. With an extremely high D-Max, or black density, equivalent to that of a digital fine art matt paper, the paper offers exceptional contrast and depth, as well as colours with vibrancy and intensity. The paper has the same true barium sulphate layer (baryta), as Baryta Photographique II, and benefits from the improved handling of the paper introduced in the second generation of this digital darkroom paper. Baryta Photographique II Matt is made on a traditional photographic alpha-cellulose base which adds to the authentic feel of a darkroom paper. The Canson® Infinity Baryta Photographique II Matt offers photographers and printmakers a unique aesthetic and feel. Find out more (product information, ICC profiles...) : https://www.canson-infinity.com/en/products/baryta-photographique-ii-matt

PhotoGloss offers an exceptional Dmax as well as a wide colour gamut and is ideal to produce stunning colour photographs. title: Matt Photo paper

It renders colours superbly and supports high inking densities, with instant drying and good waterresistance. Recommended for making posters, mock-ups and photo printing with a matte finish. Scope for hot and cold laminating.

title: Standard Plus / Opaca PM
description: Description Standard Plus / Opaca PM has been developed for black and white line drawings and colour printing. This economical paper, is instant dry and suitable for everyday use. Standard Plus / Opaca PM is ideal for digital proofs as well as engineering and design drawings.

title: "C à grain" 224 gsm
description: Description Perfect for artistic drawing, "C" à grain® paper has a fine grain that allows you to quickly obtain subtle relief effects as well as shades between light and shadow.

title: "C à grain" 125 gsm
description: Description Perfect for artistic drawing, "C" à grain® paper has a fine grain that allows you to quickly obtain subtle relief effects as well as shades between light and shadow.

title: Canson ® Academy 250 g/m²
description: Description Canson ® Academy is a multi-technique paper that offers a feeling, halfway between silk and velvet. It gives off an impression of subtlety that is reinforced by its beautiful natural white color. Ideal for pencil, felt and marker, it also lends itself to multiple wet techniques or mixed techniques (dry and wet). The color and the slightly grained appearance of its surface make it possible to obtain a harmonious rendering in which the finesse of the line and the strength of the contrasts are sublimated.

title: Colorline 150 gsm
description: Description Canson® Colorline® color paper is double-sided. The smooth side lets felt-tip pens and markers slide, while the other side, grained, can support pencils, charcoals and pastels, with beautiful relief effects.

title: Bristol 224 gsm
description: Description Canson ® Bristol is a satin paper, very white, extra-smooth and very resistant. It supports repeated corrections by scraping or erasing. It is the ideal support for the pencil, the pen, the wash, the tubular point, the airbrush.

title: Mi-Teintes ® 160 gsm
description: Description Mi-Teintes ® has a honeycomb honeycomb grain side that easily retains pigments. The other side offers a fine grain ideal for pencil or charcoal. Its high cotton content makes it both robust and flexible.

title: Tracing paper 90 gsm
description: Description The Canson® Tracing Paper set offers a paper with a satin feel, translucent and with a microfine surface. It allows lines with perfect definition and contrast.

title: Graph paper 90 gsm
description: Description The Canson ® Graph Paper set offers a smooth paper ideal for producing technical drawings with clean and impeccable lines.

title: Canson ® Mixed Media Artist Art Book
description: Description The Mixed Media Artist art book is ideal for putting all your ideas down on paper, for an elegant, faithful rendering of your thoughts. To express your inner creativity, or simply to capture a moment in time, take this watercolour art book wherever you go, thanks to its practical format. Thanks to the premium quality of its paper, the mixed media art book is a real artist's tool. It's also ideal for beginners, offering an excellent opportunity to improve their technique. This is because the mixed media art book has high grammage paper, so the ink will never bleed through. You can thus give free rein to your creativity, without fear of damaging the following pages. Paper suitable for all illustration techniques For optimum results, every illustrator's medium must be of impeccable quality. Thanks to its highly resistant composition, our mixed media paper remains perfectly stable in all circumstances, giving you the freedom to combine different artistic processes, such as watercolour, gouache, markers and acrylics. With its top-quality Mixed Media Artist paper , the Mixed Media art book makes it easy to bring your ideas to life, whatever technique you use: watercolour, acrylic, but also marker pens, inks, etc. Let your imagination run wild! Explore countless possibilities More versatile than ever, the mixed media art book lends itself to a multitude of uses and adapts to your every whim. You can use it to create a series of illustrations around a specific theme, capture a moment with a special feeling, draw a landscape to make sure you never forget it, and more. Reliable and hard-wearing, the mixed media art book has everything you need to take with you for all your adventures. It gives you a clean finish that matches your artistic aspirations. With its hard cover and elastic band fastening, the mixed media art book also comes with a practical storage pocket for your travel souvenirs!

title: Canson ® Saunders Waterford ® Art Book
description: Description With its 300g/m² weight, the watercolour art book provides the ideal conditions for easy drawing, wherever you are. Give free rein to your imagination with the watercolour art book. Watercolour is a water-based technique and therefore requires the use of a lot of water. So it's essential to choose good quality paper that can withstand this type of work without compromising the final result! The Canson ® Saunders Waterford® Art Book contains exceptional watercolour paper, manufactured traditionally on a cylindrical form. It is a high-quality paper, made at St Cuthbert's Mill and approved by the Royal Watercolour Society. It is made exclusively from cotton and complies with conservation standards. Each sheet is buffered with calcium carbonate to protect the artwork from discolouration caused by the acids present in atmospheric pollution. Its exceptional surface is created using natural wool felts to create a unique random texture. The surface is coated with gelatine to strengthen the paper and make it resistant to rubbing. Preserve the radiance of each colour With its refined structure and sensual feel, the watercolour art book is a true artist's paper, enhancing all your creations. It's the perfect medium for preserving the colour pigment in your illustration. In all circumstances, the watercolour art book guarantees a clean, detailed rendering that is faithful to your artistic ideas. Thanks to its excellent quality, the watercolour art book can be used for a wide range of techniques. You can use it to work with watercolours, washes, gouache, acrylics, ink, pastels, graphite, coloured pencils, etc. It can meet all your needs! A solid, versatile medium for illustrating your world The thickness of the paper used for this watercolour art book ensures that the colour is perfectly absorbed, so that each of your brushstrokes can be defined with total precision. The watercolour art book comes in a standard weight of 300g/m², which gives it the advantage of not curling. As such, it's ideal for beginners to use for their first projects, as budding artists can paint using a large quantity of water without the risk of damaging the paper. The elegant cover can easily be secured with the elastic fastening, and it also has a small pocket where you can keep all your souvenirs. Thanks to its practical, unobtrusive format, you can take the watercolour art book wherever you go, so you can always capture your inspiration on the spot: on a train, during a journey, on a terrace, etc. No obstacle will be able to hold back your abundant creativity!

title: Canson® Illustration Art Book
description: Description The Canson ® Illustration travel notebook is a creative companion designed for artists, drawing enthusiasts and anyone who enjoys capturing ideas with precision. Its extra-smooth white paper offers a high-quality surface, perfect for felt-tip pens, markers, nibs, pencils and ink. Thanks to its refined texture, each line gains sharpness, consistency and finesse, allowing shades and strokes to reach their full intensity. Created to highlight the creative gesture, the paper is suited to many uses. It works just as well for quick travel sketches as for more elaborate graphic compositions. Illustrators will appreciate its clarity, while fans of technical drawing will find it a reliable support for precise and structured lines. One of its main strengths is the paper’s resistance. It withstands scraping corrections without deteriorating, which allows you to refine or adjust your work without fearing damage to the page. Elegant, sturdy and practical, the Canson® Illustration travel notebook is a true ally for capturing inspiration throughout your journeys or artistic projects.

title: Mi-Teintes ® Velvet
description: Description Give your creativity free rein with Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper, specially designed to bring your pastel works to life. Whether you're an amateur or an experienced pastel artist, discover Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper, the paper of choice for creating with superior detail and remarkable technical freedom. Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper's features Canson ® Mi-Teintes ® Velvet is specially designed for pastel artists looking for a high-quality paper. This thick 430 gsm paper allows easy colour application, ensuring vast creative freedom. Its velvety surface, perfect for pastels, enhances pigment adherence and withstands wet techniques, making it ideal for precise, detailed work. This paper is excellent for easy and reliable creation. The benefits of Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper offers several benefits for pastel artists : • An ideal paper for pastels, it ensures a smooth application and allows unlimited overlaying of colours, giving life to vivid, exquisite works. • The paper quality eliminates the need for a fixative, making it easier for artists to work and preserving the purity and luminosity of the colours applied. • Exceptional pigment adhesion for brilliant, long-lasting results, allowing works to retain their intensity over time. • The use of wet techniques opens up new creative possibilities, inviting artists to explore without constraints. • A choice of 14 colours, offering a variety of backgrounds to suit every artist's vision. • Designed for precision, this paper is ideal for fine, delicate detail, essential for works requiring great accuracy. Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper: what is it suitable for? Mi-Teintes ® Velvet paper is excellent for pastels, supporting different techniques from detailed sketches to finished works. This paper is perfect for artists who favour precision and quality in their artistic expression.

description: Description XL ® Drawing is a paper specially designed for all dry techniques (pencil, charcoal, pastel, pen). Perfect for students, it is extremely resistant to erasing and scraping.
